results.description: BALTIMORE — Baltimore County Public Schools will bring cursive writing back to all second- and third-grade classrooms next school year following a pilot program launched this fall, Superintendent Myriam Rogers announced Wednesday. results.title: Missouri man accused of keeping child in hot shower, resulting in third-degree burns, while trying to ‘teach’ a lesson
results.description: PINEVILLE, Mo. -- A Missouri man is facing felony child abuse charges after police say he made a child stay in a hot shower for hours, leaving the child with third degree burns on 40% of his body.

results.title: Classic cars, music to headline senior celebration in Webster County
results.description: Join the Webster County Senior Center for a day of nostalgia, music and classic cars during its Older Americans Month celebration from 10 a.m. to 1 p.m. Friday, May 29, at Canaan Ridge Park, 1600 State Route 132 West in Dixon. Live music will be sponsored by United Community Bank. Lunch sponsors include Independence Bank,... results.title: Guyana lines up global EPC field for Wales fertilizer plant
results.description: Guyana has attracted a mix of Chinese, US, Indian, European and local engineering groups to bid for the Guyana Ammonia and Urea Plant (GAUP), a 300,000 t/y fertilizer project planned at Wales alongside the country’s gas‐to‐energy complex.
